impactMessages.25: Provides a hygiene kit for one woman
impactMessages.50: Covers bus passes for job interviews and appointments
impactMessages.100: Funds workshop supplies for life skills training
impactMessages.250: Supports one night of safe housing
impactMessages.500: Sponsors a complete employment readiness program
impactMessages.1000: Provides comprehensive support for one woman's first month

donationMessage: Your support brings dignity and hope to women rebuilding their lives. Together, we rise.
taxMessage: She Rises is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Your donation is tax-deductible to the full extent of the law.
